final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial sports photography of an NBA Finals highlight moment featuring a basketball player wearing jersey number 23.

Style/medium: professional sports photography, photorealistic, ultra-high-speed shutter capture, 1/2000s exposure
Composition: low-angle upward shot emphasizing player height and explosive power, shallow depth of field with spectacular bokeh on background crowd
Subject: basketball player wearing jersey number 23, airborne with perfect athletic arc, visible muscle definition, explosive and focused facial expression, completing a powerful dunk under double-team defense
Scene/backdrop: packed NBA arena with tens of thousands of standing cheering spectators, sea of flashing camera lights like stars, court floor with visible lines and brand logos
Lighting/mood: professional multi-point high-brightness arena lighting, uniform color temperature, dramatic spotlight on player
Color palette: warm skin tones against cool arena lighting, vibrant team colors on jersey, golden flash lights scattered across dark background
Materials/textures: glossy hardwood court surface, sweat on skin, fabric texture of jersey
Constraints: razor-sharp with zero motion blur, professional sports photography grade
Avoid: motion blur, soft focus, amateur lighting, watermark, 8K stuffer words
